setup_cmd: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3-dev build-essential libgl1-mesa-dev libxkbcommon-x11-0 libglib2.0-0 libegl1 libxcb-xinerama0 libxcb-cursor0 xvfb libfontconfig1 libdbus-1-3 libxcb-icccm4 libxcb-image0 libxcb-keysyms1 libxcb-render-util0 libxcb-shape0 && uv venv /opt/venv --quiet && uv pip install --python /opt/venv/bin/python -e ".[tests]" --quiet
